creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
^Triage: 

* normalise the summary line prefix
* update the remainder of the summary line
* note that the port is at version 3.11.1
* populate the see also: field
* …

----

Side note: future commits for version updates will benefit from a link to release notes for the version, for example <https://github.com/gpodder/gpodder/releases/tag/3.11.1> for <https://github.com/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/cdb344a5167cb180e171251cb2a850b7433ef2c0>. 

Thanks
